Description: This component is a Schottky barrier diode series featuring a low forward voltage drop, guard ring construction for transient protection, negligible reverse recovery time, and low reverse capacitance. It is designed for high-efficiency switching applications where fast switching and low power loss are critical.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Positive terminal, current flows into this pin when forward biased.
Negative terminal, current flows out of this pin when forward biased.
